items.caption:
A serene moment in a modern hospital waiting room. the room is bathed in soft light, creating a calm atmosphere. dominating the foreground is a wheelchair, its blue seat contrasting with the white floor. the wheelchair is parked in front of a desk, suggesting it's ready for use.

in the background, two individuals can be seen. one is seated on a chair, perhaps waiting for their turn or simply taking a break. the other is standing, possibly engaged in a conversation or simply observing their surroundings.

the room itself is tastefully decorated with a wooden floor that adds a touch of warmth to the space. a painting adorns the wall, adding an artistic touch to the room. the overall scene paints a picture of a well-organized and comfortable waiting area in a modern hospital.
